name: Release Notes v3.5.5 - POS and Back Office
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes v3.5.5 - POS and Back Office"}], "data-id": "release-notes-v3-5-5-pos-and-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Release version:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 3.5.5 | "}, {"text": "Release Date:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 6 June 2019"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Release-Notes-v3-5-0-Back-Office-and-PO", "children": [{"text": "update to v3.5.0"}]}, {"text": " we've implemented new functionality with Offline POS and addressed "}, {"text": "1 issue", "bold": true}, {"text": ". See below for more detail."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "New Feature - Manually prompt a resync of Offline POS", "bold": true}], "data-id": "new-feature-manually-prompt-a-resync-of-offline-pos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now force a resynchronisation of activity performed while in Offline POS mode!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "At a glance...", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can "}, {"text": "manually", "bold": true}, {"text": "force an Offline POS synchronisation", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express will try to synchronise transactions when your system returns online (as per the normal process)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Forcing a synchronisation will "}, {"text": "synchronise everything", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfZeEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfZeEAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 - 2023-07-09T221925.485.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the new feature you will be able to manually prompt a resynchronisation of the Offline POS system. This will be useful in times where synchronisations were unable to be completed, or there's a need to resynchronise transactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the new feature:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into the Retail Express "}, {"text": "Back Office", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > External Services > Offline POS Servers", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Resync button will appear in the new Resync column on the right"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on Offline POS, please see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Installing-Offline-POS", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS - Overview, Installation and FAQs"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "*Resolutions"}], "data-id": "resolutions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below is a list of resolutions included in the latest Maintenance Release:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Stock-Replenishment-via-Transfer", "children": [{"text": "Transfers"}]}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An issue has been resolved where stock that was not Available had been assigned to be transferred during the Stock Replenishment process."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-6ce271f2"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Stay up-to-date with news from the Support team - subscribe now"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Stock-Replenishment-via-Transfer", "children": [{"text": "Inventory - Stock Replenishment via Transfer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Installing-Offline-POS", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS - Overview, Installation and FAQs"}]}]}]}]}]
